Goa.name: Calangute Beach
Goa.description: Popular tourist beach with water sports and a lively market.

Goa.name: Baga Beach
Goa.description: Known for nightlife, shacks and vibrant atmosphere.

Goa.name: Fort Aguada
Goa.description: 17th-century Portuguese fort with panoramic sea views.

Goa.name: Basilica of Bom Jesus
Goa.description: UNESCO World Heritage site housing relics of St. Francis Xavier.

Mysore.name: Mysore Palace
Mysore.description: Lavish historical palace and the city's top attraction.

Mysore.name: Chamundi Hills
Mysore.description: Hilltop temple complex with panoramic views of Mysore.

Mysore.name: Brindavan Gardens
Mysore.description: Famous terraced gardens known for musical fountains.

Bangalore.name: Lalbagh Botanical Garden
Bangalore.description: Historic botanical garden with glasshouse and diverse flora.

Bangalore.name: Bangalore Palace
Bangalore.description: Palace inspired by Windsor Castle with ornate interiors.

Bangalore.name: Cubbon Park
Bangalore.description: Large green park in the heart of the city, ideal for walks.

Delhi.name: Red Fort
Delhi.description: Iconic Mughal fort and UNESCO World Heritage site.

Delhi.name: Qutub Minar
Delhi.description: Tall minaret built in the 12th century with intricate carvings.

Delhi.name: India Gate
Delhi.description: War memorial and popular open-area landmark.

Mumbai.name: Gateway of India
Mumbai.description: Monument built during the 20th century overlooking the harbor.

Mumbai.name: Marine Drive
Mumbai.description: Scenic promenade along the coast, great for sunsets.

Jaipur.name: Amber Fort
Jaipur.description: Hilltop fort with beautiful palaces and mirrored halls.

Jaipur.name: Hawa Mahal
Jaipur.description: Iconic pink sandstone palace with latticed windows.

Kochi.name: Fort Kochi
Kochi.description: Historic neighborhood with colonial architecture and cafes.

Pondicherry.name: Promenade Beach
Pondicherry.description: Coastal promenade with French Quarter nearby.
